query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description) VALUES
('analysis', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', '2025', '2025_Cummins_ECU_Complete_Analysis.txt', 'txt', 4500, 'RSA/SHA256 code signing, physical memory map, EFD EBML format, PKI infrastructure, three-gen BIN comparison'),
('efd', 'Cummins', '2025_ZF_8AP', '2025', '05190374ag.efd', 'efd', 3510189, 'EFD 2025 RAM 6.7L TCM RWD ZF 8AP1075 NAS-50 STATE, Program 25HD_6.7_8AP1075'),
('efd', 'Cummins', '2025_ZF_8AP', '2025', '05190375ag.efd', 'efd', 3510185, 'EFD 2025 RAM 6.7L TCM 4WD ZF 8AP1075'),
('efd', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', '2025', '62430530ad.efd', 'efd', 7288087, 'EFD 2025 RAM 6.7L ECM by Roger via EB2-Production v1.03.0027'),

('binary', 'Cummins', '2025_PCM_000C', '2025', 'FULL.bin', 'bin', 83892224, '80MB full flash dump with RSA code signing, cert store at 0x1001700, 5 physical blocks'),
('analysis', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2014-2022', 'cummins_3gen_comparison.txt', 'txt', 5000, '2014 4MB vs 2019 8MB dual-bank vs 2022 8MB locked BIN format evolution'),
('ols', 'Dodge', 'VM_Motori_3.0L', '2014-2017', 'DodgeRam1500EcoDieselfromA2L.ols', 'ols', 0, 'WinOLS A2L for RAM 1500 3.0L EcoDiesel - thresholds useful for diagnostics'),
('ols', 'Bosch', 'EDC17C69', 'N/A', 'WinOLS_EDC17C69_MapReaddressing.ols', 'ols', 0, 'Map readdressing technique reference - how to move maps to new flash addresses'),
('calibration_report', 'Dodge', 'FCA', '2025', 'FCACalibrationReportAugust82025.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'Latest FCA calibration data for tune matching'),
('reference', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2013-2025', 'CumminsHP_FuelPump_ID_Differences.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'Fuel pump identification for auto-matching tunes to hardware config'),
('pid_definition', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2013-2025', 'Cummins.Channels_CMF.xml', 'xml', 0, 'HPT PID addresses and scaling factors for datalogging'),
('training', 'Universal', NULL, 'N/A', 'AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshooting.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'Engine performance troubleshooting techniques'),
('training', 'Universal', NULL, 'N/A', 'Re-mappingcourse.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'ECU remapping course for Knox learning'),
('binary', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2019-2021', 'STOCK_2019D2DJR_52370931AM.bin', 'bin', 8462336, '8MB dual-bank format, Gen2 reference for security research'),
('binary', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2022-2024', 'STOCK_2022D2DJR_52370231AK.bin', 'bin', 8462336, '8MB locked format, Gen3 reference for security cracking'),
('damos', 'Dodge', 'Bosch_P1502_K143', '2019+', 'DAMOS_DodgeRam_EcoDiesel_P1502_K143.ols', 'ols', 0, 'Full DAMOS for 2019+ RAM EcoDiesel 3.0L - OEM thresholds, map definitions, axis breakpoints for live tuning and diagnostics accuracy'),
('binary', 'Cummins', 'CM2350', '2014', 'STOCK_2014D2DJR_32370231SF.bin', 'bin', 4202496, '4MB Gen1 reference BIN, PowerPC BE, cal at 0x6B43C');
